learningObjectives.title: Understand BTP integration role
learningObjectives.description: Explain SAP BTP as the central cloud integration platform for SAP TM landscapes.

learningObjectives.title: Understand BTP services
learningObjectives.description: Describe Integration Suite, API management, event, identity, and connectivity services.

learningObjectives.title: Understand cloud integration benefits
learningObjectives.description: Clarify security, scalability, and simplification of enterprise integrations.

sections.content: SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) provides the cloud integration foundation for SAP Transportation Management. It enables SAP TM to connect securely with SAP cloud applications, on-premise systems and third-party logistics solutions through APIs, integration flows and event-driven communication.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: SAP BTP acts as the integration platform that securely connects SAP TM with SAP and non-SAP applications.

A global manufacturer operates SAP S/4HANA on-premise and SAP TM in the cloud. SAP BTP Integration Suite synchronizes deliveries, Freight Orders and shipment events while securely connecting external carriers through APIs and SAP Business Network.

sections.title: Traditional Integration vs SAP BTP Integration
Best Practice
sections.content: Use SAP Integration Suite for standard integrations and APIs instead of developing custom point-to-point interfaces whenever possible.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A multinational logistics organization migrated its SAP TM integrations to SAP BTP Integration Suite, reducing interface maintenance by over 50% while improving system reliability and monitoring.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: For SAP TM interviews, remember that SAP BTP is the recommended integration platform for connecting SAP TM with cloud services, APIs and external business partners.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: SAP BTP is an integration platform, not a replacement for SAP TM. Transportation planning and execution remain SAP TM responsibilities.

items: SAP BTP provides cloud integration capabilities for SAP TM.
Integration Suite, API Management and Event Mesh are major BTP services.
SAP BTP connects SAP TM with SAP systems and third-party applications.
Cloud integration supports secure, scalable and real-time communication.
SAP BTP simplifies enterprise-wide logistics integration.
